name: Peking Union Medical College Hospital
shortDescription: Top-ranked Chinese teaching hospital; flagship of the Republican-era American medical tradition and a major academic trial site.
narrativeHook: Built with Rockefeller Foundation money in 1917 to be 'a medical school and hospital comparable with that of the leading institutions of Western civilization,' PUMC remains the most-cited teaching hospital in China and the canonical lineage point for the country's first generation of internationally trained physicians.

hospitalContext.affiliation: Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences / Peking Union Medical College
hospitalContext.hookFact: Has ranked #1 on the Fudan University Hospital Management Institute's Chinese Hospital Rankings continuously since the index began in 2009.

timeline.status: Established 1917 with Rockefeller China Medical Board funding; small graduating classes (30–50) produced China's first internationally-trained physician cohort.
timeline.note: Original campus on the site of a former Qing royal palace in Beijing.

timeline.status: Became part of CAMS-PUMC system; preserved as a teaching hospital through the Cultural Revolution period.
Major academic trial site as China entered the GCP era.

name: Fudan University Shanghai Cancer Center
nameZh: 复旦大学附属肿瘤医院
shortDescription: Largest Shanghai oncology hospital; a primary trial site for domestic PD-1, ADC, and bispecific programs.
narrativeHook: By the 2020s Fudan Cancer Center was hosting the China leg of the registration trials that would carry domestically-discovered checkpoint inhibitors and ADCs into NMPA approval — including PIs and trial sites for camrelizumab, sintilimab, disitamab vedotin, and ivonescimab programs.

hospitalContext.hookFact: Fudan University Shanghai Cancer Center has consistently ranked in the top 3 oncology hospitals on the Fudan University Hospital Management Institute index since 2010.

timeline.status: Operating as Shanghai Cancer Hospital under Shanghai Medical College (later Fudan University).
Site for the first generation of China-led oncology Phase 2/3 trials.
Leading PI sites for the PD-1 / PD-L1 wave (camrelizumab, sintilimab, toripalimab).
Site for ADC, bispecific, and CDK-program registration trials.
